text.title: Methodology Versioning and CHANGELOG Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Methodology Versioning and CHANGELOG methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: MAJOR = breaking schema change OR rule-id rename / removal; MINOR = additive rule OR new content file; PATCH = wording / non-semantic fix. The bump MUST match the diff classification.
rule.rationale: Without strict semver semantics, downstream agents cannot pin or upgrade safely.

rule.statement: Every version bump MUST add a CHANGELOG entry under `## [Unreleased]` listing scope (added/changed/removed) and linking the migration plan (if MAJOR). Missing entry blocks merge.
rule.rationale: CHANGELOG is the human-readable counterpart of the semver bump; missing entries make audits expensive.

rule.statement: MAJOR bumps MUST ship a migration plan: per-field old→new mapping, per-rule-id rename mapping, and a worked example showing the diff applied.
rule.rationale: MAJOR bumps break consumers; without a plan, consumers must reverse-engineer the change.

rule.statement: `content_id` MUST be recomputed (sha1(slug+version)[:16]) on every version bump and reflected in AGENTS.md frontmatter.
rule.rationale: Stale content_id defeats consumer pinning and cache invalidation.

rule.statement: Removing a rule id from `01-core-rules.xml` requires MAJOR bump AND a migration plan entry explaining the drop. Silent removals are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Removed rules can be referenced by downstream methodologies; silent drops produce dangling references.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-methodology-versioning-and-changelog.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
